calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Neal McGettigan for and with William Terheyden (Petitioner).

Mr. McGettigan stated that Mr. Terheyden conceded that the amount of $3,923.00 should be reduced, that it was a complex accounting, that there were estate taxes and submitted the accounting bills for the Court's review. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Continued To Dec-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Neal McGettigan appearing for and with petitioner/executor William Terheyden. Erik Dryber appearing as co-counsel. Disclaimer issue addressed. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tony Santiago.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Continued To Jun-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
